docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,242.85 FILED BY DUNDIS GREG AS TO DEFENDANT LEUNG WAYNE (DRIVER) VONG SOK HOO (OWNER) CHEUNG WAI KAY (DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
